title: Trump Says Giving EU Until July 4 To Fulfill Trade Deal Or Will Raise Tariffs
summary_full: Trump on Friday had threatened to increase tariffs on EU cars and trucks to 25% this week, from 15% currently, because the EU was not complying with the terms of a deal struck in Scotland last July.
summary_public: Trump on Friday had threatened to increase tariffs on EU cars and trucks to 25% this week, from 15% currently, because the EU was not complying with the terms of a deal struck in Scotland last July.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: deal struck in Scotland last July.
